name: @effortprogrammer/lazy-claudecode-ultrawork
description: Claude Code plugin that injects the ultrawork orchestration directive and ships LazyClaude planning, review, QA, and gate agent roles.

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-directive.mjs && node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && bun build src/cli.ts --target node --format esm --outfile dist/cli.js
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && biome check . && npm run build
